recommended_tool_changes.detail: Add observed_class=sparse_motion when mean>STATIC_MEAN_MAX, max<CUT_HIST_L1_HARD_THRESHOLD, and moderate_fraction in [0.15,0.50). Genuine AV-sync candidate sits here.
Held-out keep frac>=0.5; production profile allow frac>=0.28. Observed mod_frac=0.292.
Raising STATIC_MAX_MAX to ~0.38 would mislabel sparse spike media as static and risk held-out pan/cut separation.

mux_replay.recipe: ffmpeg -y -i source_video_ffv1.mkv -i strict_sync_mix_mono_16k.wav -map 0:v:0 -map 1:a:0 -c:v copy -c:a pcm_s16le -ar 16000 -ac 1 -frames:v 49 -af apad -shortest <out.mkv>
